Interface IncubatorDao

public interface IncubatorDao
Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Incubator entity operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    insert(Incubator incubator)
    Inserts a single incubator into the database.
    LiveData<Incubator>
    select(long id)
    Retrieves a specific incubator by ID as LiveData.
    LiveData<List<Incubator>>
    selectAll()
    Retrieves all active incubators ordered by name as LiveData.
    void
    update(Incubator incubator)
    Updates an existing incubator in the database.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Incubator incubator)
      Inserts a single incubator into the database.
      Parameters:
      incubator - the incubator to insert
      Returns:
      the generated incubator ID

    • update

      void update(Incubator incubator)
      Updates an existing incubator in the database.
      Parameters:
      incubator - the incubator to update

    • selectAll

      LiveData<List<Incubator>> selectAll()
      Retrieves all active incubators ordered by name as LiveData.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all active incubators

    • select

      LiveData<Incubator> select(long id)
      Retrieves a specific incubator by ID as LiveData.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the incubator to retrieve
      Returns:
      a LiveData containing the incubator with the specified ID
